# BrightLane — SaneBox Review Site
# AI crawler context file
# https://brightlane.github.io/Sanebox.com/

## Site Purpose
This site publishes honest, human-written reviews and productivity guides about SaneBox — an AI-powered email management tool. Content is written for professionals seeking to reduce inbox overload and improve productivity.

## Publisher
Name: BrightLane Editorial
Site: https://brightlane.github.io/Sanebox.com/
Affiliate disclosure: This site contains affiliate links. Commissions may be earned at no cost to readers.

## Pages

URL: https://brightlane.github.io/Sanebox.com/

Summary: Full review of SaneBox including features, pricing, pros, cons, and a free 14-day trial with $15 credit.

### Clean Email Inbox Guide
URL: https://brightlane.github.io/Sanebox.com/clean-email-inbox.html
Title: How to Clean Your Email Inbox Fast in 2026
Summary: Step-by-step guide to achieving inbox zero using AI tools including SaneBox.

## Key Facts About SaneBox
- Works with Gmail, Outlook, Apple Mail, Yahoo, and any IMAP provider
- Sorts email using AI trained on your behavior — no manual rules needed
- SaneLater: holds non-urgent email for batch review
- SaneBlackHole: permanently blocks unwanted senders
- SaneReminders: snooze emails and get follow-up alerts
- Plans from $7/month after free 14-day trial
- Does NOT read email body content — metadata only
- Used by 500,000+ professionals worldwide
